title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CLINIC - 211info
text: HEALTH SATELLITE CENTER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to services including but not limited to mental health assessments, counseling services, emotional/life skills coaching, and trauma recovery/trauma informed care. Also provides resources related to substance abuse such as assessment, counseling, anger management classes, relapse prevention, and aftercare. 6000 New Way Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Native American individuals of federally recognized tribes Hours: Phone Line: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Lobby: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 884-1841 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 884-1841 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare, and provide insurance. Also offers sliding scale fees. DOCUMENTS: Tribal card or certification from a federally recognized tribe, birth certificate/photo identification such as state issued ID or a driver's license, social security card, insurance cards. Proof of income will be required for those without insurance. Klamath Tribal members or children of Klamath Tribal members residing in Kalmath County must provide a current utility bill or rental receipt with rental contract in order to show residency. AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Anger Management * Native American Community Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Native American Community Community Mental Health Agencies * Native American Community Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Native American Community Psychiatric Case Management * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEALTH SATELLITE CENTER
